_note: Curated remediation guidance per ScoutSuite finding rule. Validated fail-closed against gcp.rules.txt.

cloudstorage-bucket-no-public-access-pre.summary: Enable public access prevention on the bucket.
steps: Set public access prevention to 'enforced' on the bucket/org.
Turn on uniform bucket-level access to disable per-object ACLs.
Turn on versioning to retain overwritten/deleted objects.
Configure access/usage logs to a dedicated bucket.

cloudsql-instances-public-ips.json.summary: Remove the public IP from the Cloud SQL instance.
steps: Switch to private IP / Private Service Connect and disable the public IP.

cloudsql-instance-ssl-not-required.json.summary: Require SSL/TLS for Cloud SQL connections.
steps: Set 'Require SSL' (or enforce TLS) on the instance.
Turn on automated backups and point-in-time recovery.
Restrict authorized networks to known CIDRs or use private IP.

computeengine-instance-public-ip-adresse.summary: Remove external IPs from instances where possible.
steps: Use Cloud NAT / IAP and drop the external IP from the instance.

computeengine-instance-default-service-a.summary: Do not use the default service account on instances.
steps: Attach a dedicated least-privilege service account.
Replace broad scopes with IAM roles scoped to need.
Set enable-oslogin=TRUE at project/instance metadata.
Set serial-port-enable=FALSE in metadata.
Recreate the instance with canIpForward disabled.
Enable secure boot, vTPM, and integrity monitoring on the instance.
Scope the firewall rule to known sources or use IAP for TCP forwarding.

computeengine-firewall-rule-opens-all-po.summary: Remove firewall rules opening all ports to all.
steps: Delete the broad allow rule and scope to required ports/sources.

computeengine-firewall-default-rule-in-u.summary: Avoid relying on the default network/firewall.
steps: Use a custom VPC with explicit least-privilege firewall rules.
Turn on flow logs on the subnets.

kms-cryptokeys-anonymously-publicly-acce.summary: Remove public/anonymous access to KMS keys.
steps: Remove allUsers/allAuthenticatedUsers from the key IAM policy.
Set a rotation period (e.g. 90 days) on the crypto key.

iam-primitive-role-in-use.json.summary: Replace primitive roles (Owner/Editor/Viewer) with predefined roles.
steps: Grant least-privilege predefined or custom roles instead.

iam-sa-has-admin-privileges.json.summary: Remove admin privileges from service accounts.
steps: Scope the service account to least-privilege roles.
Use Workload Identity / short-lived credentials and delete downloaded keys.
Rotate keys regularly or migrate to keyless Workload Identity.
Enable Cloud Logging for the cluster.

kubernetesengine-legacy-abac-enabled.jso.summary: Disable legacy ABAC on the GKE cluster.
steps: Disable legacy authorization so RBAC is enforced.
